steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage notes that modern planes have much sleeker, more streamlined bodies, which explains why they are more aerodynamic.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The logical relationship is cause-effect — modern planes have sleeker bodies, and that design change explains why they are more aerodynamic. The blank needs a transition signaling a result.
  • Choice A — "On the contrary,": signals a direct contradiction of what preceded it, so fails — greater aerodynamics follows from sleeker bodies, it does not oppose it. ✗
  • Choice B — "As a result,": signals that what follows is a direct consequence of what preceded it, so fits. ✓
  • Choice C — "Regardless,": signals something that holds true despite obstacles, so fails — no obstacle or concession is present. ✗
  • Choice D — "Lastly,": signals the final item in a sequence or list, so fails — the sentence is not the last of a listed series. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
